name: Shelley Daniels
profileSummary:
I am confident and skilled in creating a wide range of printed media, from booklets and brand guidelines to POS, OOO and creating logo designs and brand identity. I can design vehicle livery and exhibition stands. I have designed landing pages for web, can create ideas for social media ads and email templates.

 

I enjoy creating moodboards particularly for food and can see the project through from start to finish; initial moodboard (choosing colour palette, props, styling) to page layout and art direction of the photography. I love brochure design, particularly working in an editorial style.

 I enjoy working up concepts for Point of Sale in retail stores and like to explore new ways of elevating in store communication.
